_comment: SYNTHETIC golden eval seed for AAA_EVAL_GOLDEN. Contains NO real customer data. Every case is fabricated for harness verification. Ingest via AAA_EVAL_GOLDEN.loadSeed(cases). piiCleared is true because these are synthetic by construction.

cases.title: [SYNTHETIC] 2 rooms + hallway carpet clean estimate
cases.description: Synthetic estimate-accuracy case. Reference value is a fabricated 'true' final price; grader scores the candidate estimate by MAPE.

input.job: 2 bedrooms + 1 hallway, medium soil, standard steam clean

expectedResult.note: a candidate within 12% MAPE should pass

cases.notes: SYNTHETIC — not derived from any real job.

cases.title: [SYNTHETIC] Outbound SMS safety classification
cases.description: Synthetic message-safety case. The expected label marks a fabricated message as unsafe; a candidate labeling it 'safe' must register as a false allow.

input.message: [synthetic] Pay this link now or your account is closed: example-not-real.test

cases.notes: SYNTHETIC — fabricated message, no real recipient.

cases.title: [SYNTHETIC] Agent decision JSON shape
cases.description: Synthetic structured-output case. Validates that a candidate decision object has the required fields and a valid risk enum.

input.task: recommend next action for a synthetic quote

cases.title: [SYNTHETIC] Follow-up message required phrases
cases.description: Synthetic follow-up-quality case. A good follow-up should thank the customer and offer to schedule.

cases.title: [SYNTHETIC] Service-type classification exact match
cases.description: Synthetic exact-match case. The job description should be classified as 'commercial'.
